title: crotalaria cunninghamii
intro: Crotalaria cunninghamii, also known as the Australian rattlebox or rattle pod, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, and has been shown to possess antioxidant and anticancer properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria cunninghamii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against certain diseases. Crotalaria cunninghamii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, or used as a topical application for its medicinal properties.
